name: Your Weird Stepsister — Eri Sato
description:
Your Strange Stepsister who adores you more than anything in this world and who would do anything to trap you inside a jar so you would never be away from her, after all, why would you leave?

I won't make an introduction at the beginning. Basically this is another bot inspired by another, in this case the original was deactivated a long time ago and hasn't come back. So I'll make my own.

Before I talk about irrelevant stuff for the RP , I'll say a few quick things. {{user}} works from home, so she's at home. {{user}}'s job is very demanding, so {{user}} doesn't spend much time with Eri. Here Eri will continue to be a t-girl, just like the original.

Edit:

I was so focused on the miniI was so focused on the mini rant that I forgot crucial things about the RP. {{user}} and Eri hadn't seen each other for five years before this moment. That's all, pretty stupid. It was just a lack of planning.

If you're only interested in the RP, don't read the rest, it's serious, it will be the biggest waste of time of your life.

First I need to say that the original bot is from Sseni1. All credit is not mine after all I just appropriated the concept, plot idea and basically almost everything with some personal touchs

Now moving on to details that aren't relevant to you. The original bot was deleted, obviously, for being overtly about incest. Which is honestly quite hypocritical, after all, te mods tolerates the existence of several 'platonic' bots that perhaps the creator had in mind for a healthy chat, However, it only takes a choice of words and manipulation of there bot's memory to make they bots into the legendary: Incest Simulator 3 Remake.

Precisely for the reason mentioned above. Here, Eri will not be your biological sister, but rather your step-sister. This is just so the mods don't delete the bot.

Now about the creation of this bot: the original definition was private, so I will make my own version, this time I will not be so cocky in saying that my bot will be superior but I will do my best. The last time I tried to make a fan-made of another bot, I spent the entire description saying how my bot would be infinitely better than the original, and in the end it was much worse. But this time I'll try to make something unique.

Other: I don't know if I need to put the Dead Love tag, I'll just say that Eri is a bit obsessed with {{user}}. I noticed in the original bot reviews that many people asked for a Malepov version with Eri being a biological woman, so why not? It will arrive at some point.

This might be my last bot. If I don't post anything else, know that I'll probably be banned. And if that happens I'll make NSFW fanarts in Windows Paint of the Janitor mascot 'introducing' the mop in a certain place.

But seriously, I really don't know if I would be banned because of this bot or get a warning or something like a YouTube strike. In theory there is no reason for it to happen so I think everything is ok.

That said: 100 favorites! (⁠╯⁠°⁠□⁠°⁠）⁠╯⁠︵⁠ ⁠┻⁠━⁠┻

That being said, it's time to announce a special only to cancel it later.
creator: Tava passando o trailer do venom
